pricePolicy: Displayed card prices now match the assigned Stripe Buy Button IDs.

products.name: Native Sponsor Card
products.bestFor: In-grid sponsor cards inside plant/category pages.
products.placement: Native card inside plant results, category grids, Plant Facts libraries, and long card pages.
products.description: A clean native sponsor card that blends into AtHomeGrower card grids without feeling spammy.

products.name: Tool Sponsor Placement
products.bestFor: Fill My Space, Plant Diagnoser, Companion Planting, and Zones.
products.placement: Sponsor block near high-intent tools where users are actively choosing plants or diagnosing issues.
products.description: Best for brands that sell plant care, soil, pots, grow lights, seeds, pest control, or gardening tools.

products.name: Category Sponsor Placement
products.bestFor: Plant Care, Plant Type, Fruits, Herbs, Vegetables, Cover Crops, and Store categories.
products.placement: Category-level sponsor block on sections with focused garden shopping or learning intent.
products.description: Good for a brand that wants ownership of a specific content category.

products.name: Sitewide Sponsor Placement
products.bestFor: Premium visibility across the main AtHomeGrower experience.
products.placement: Top leaderboard-style sponsor space across major pages.
products.description: The highest visibility placement for brands that want broad AtHomeGrower exposure.

products.name: Sponsored Feature Post
products.trialText: One-time sponsored feature, no free trial
products.bestFor: One sponsored article, product spotlight, grow guide, or seasonal feature.
products.placement: One dedicated sponsored feature page or post, reviewed before publishing.
products.description: A one-time sponsored content option for brands that want a featured placement without a monthly plan.

products.name: Ad Spot Setup / Creative Review
products.trialText: One-time setup and creative review, no free trial
products.bestFor: Reserving a sponsor spot while placement, creative, and fit are confirmed.
products.placement: Reservation/setup option before a full monthly sponsorship is activated.
products.description: A low-friction setup or reservation payment for brands that need review before choosing a monthly slot.

buttonMappingFix.5: uses $149 one-time Sponsored Feature Post button
buttonMappingFix.6: unchanged $25 one-time Ad Spot Setup / Creative Review button
